'''Gartana''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Gorsh system/Legends|Gorsh system]], with twelve [[Moon/Legends|moons]] in its [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Its [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] were composed of [[Water/Legends|water]] that was toxic.

{{Planet-stub}}
